privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio network data. It was explicitly verified that the required synthetic charging infrastructure parameters exactly match the prompt instructions and the strict logical requirements of the verifier script: charger ID is "fast_charger_1", power is "200000", battery capacity is "50000", charge level is "10000", and charging duration is "120".
